Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the user has provided a detailed description of a property onboarding process and wants me to generate a list of open ended questions to clarify and improve understanding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The questions should focus on conceptual aspects like decision criteria roles timing and exceptions not technical implementation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: first I need to identify gaps in the description

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process seems linear but has many decision points and dependencies

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I should ask about how decisions are made at each stage especially around manager assignment and tenant selection

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The roles of different teams compliance finance IT need clarification how do they interact and when are they involved

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Timing and sequencing are important too

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How long does each phase typically take What happens if one step is delayed

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description mentions exceptions like special insurance or custom lease clauses how are those handled

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: communication methods are mentioned email CRM but how is information tracked and escalated

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I should also probe about metrics or success indicators

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How does the company measure the efficiency of this process Are there bottlenecks or common failure points

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the interviewee might have insights into improvements or pain points they havent mentioned yet

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me structure the questions to flow logically start with overarching goals then dive into specific stages roles timing exceptions and finally continuous improvement

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Keep them open ended to encourage detailed responses
